project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite board game (Rising Sun adaptation)
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx tsc --noEmit to check type safety. 2. Run npm run build to verify production build succeeds.
contribution_requirements: Work directly on main branch, commit and push
key_patterns: - Single App.css file with minified CSS classes on one line each. - Zustand store in src/store/gameStore.ts. - i18n translations in src/i18n/en.ts and src/i18n/es.ts. - Components in src/components/. - Game state type in src/types/game.ts. - Server with Express + SQLite in src/server/. - ClanShield component renders clan seal SVGs.
directory_structure: Root: package.json, vite.config.ts, tsconfig.json. src/: App.tsx, App.css, main.tsx. src/components/: All React components. src/store/: Zustand gameStore.ts. src/types/: game.ts type definitions. src/utils/: gameLogic.ts. src/server/: Express server (index.ts, database.ts). src/i18n/: en.ts, es.ts. src/img/: NoboruTaiyo.png, type_game_bg.png, etc.
